name: masala-design-system
description: MCP server for the Innovaccer Masala Design System. Provides tools for tokens, components, examples, patterns, helpers, and code validation.
long_description:
The Masala Design System (MDS) MCP server enables AI coding tools to correctly use Innovaccer's design system.

**This server is read-only and makes no network requests.** It only reads static JSON files bundled inside the extension itself — it does not access your files, environment variables, or the internet.

It provides 14 deterministic tools backed by static manifests — no AI inside. Tools cover design tokens, component props/variants/a11y, usage examples, UI patterns, CSS helper classes, and a code validator that checks for raw HTML controls, hardcoded colors, non-approved imports, and inline styles.

tools.name: ds_get_component
tools.description: Get component props, variants, and a11y info

tools.name: ds_get_example
tools.description: Get full example code by ID

tools.name: ds_get_pattern
tools.description: Get pattern code and component list

tools.name: ds_search_helpers
tools.description: Search CSS helper/utility classes by keyword

tools.name: ds_validate_code
tools.description: Validate code for DS compliance (colors, imports, HTML controls, inline styles)

tools.name: ds_get_usage
tools.description: Get usage guidelines for a component
